title: Bolsius True Joy Botanic Freshness Scented Bouquet - Green - 80ml - Lasts Up to 8 Weeks - Natural Extracts - Herbal Formula
features: Take some time for yourself with our Bolsius True Joy Botanic Freshness scented bouquet and experience the invigorating scent of an herb garden on a summer day. This scented bouquet guarantees the purest fragrance diffusion for up to 8 weeks, thanks to our ScentFusion technology. Our technology is a unique combination of a sophisticated fragrance blend and a herbal formula that ensures a perfect olfactory experience.
Botanic Freshness is a summer, botanical fragrance, with aromatic herbs such as bruised tomato leaf with a hint of citrus. Experience the invigorating scent of an herb garden on a summer day.
The composition was made from natural extracts. The subtle fragrance gradually spreads throughout the room and persists for up to 8 weeks. Enjoy a pure and intense olfactory experience in your home

Be enchanted by True Joy's rich scents, capturing the beauty of nature through vibrant colors, captivating shapes and alluring fragrances. Treat yourself to a unique blend of our fragrances, elegantly presented - a perfect gift for everyone. Designed with ScentFusion technology, we guarantee the purest fragrance and the release of the cleanest fragrance.

Since 1870, Bolsius has been producing quality products that create comfort and ambience. We do it with passion, artisan way and with love for people and the planet. Bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candle light and fragrances that stimulate your senses. This is how you make every moment special. For yourself and everyone around you.
